name: Battle City Online
description: Battle City Online contains 35 different levels Each map contains different types of terrain and obstacles You can play with your friends locally, or online (coming soon) You can create your own map and play it with friends Drive the tank of your childhood :) I dare you to pass all levels, protecting the city against tanks super smart Todos :- 1- Multiplayer online game play 2- Shop - players can sell or buy their rewards and their own maps 3- Implement coin system for betting and tournaments 4- Implement joystick support in map editor 5- Better UI for Map Editor section. 6- Implement AI difficulty to support (easy, normal, hard) play modes
instructions: 1- keyboard 2- joystick - only xbox 360 3- mouse to navigate through UI
